body.p: To advoid data unavailable caused by hardware,the users need to regularly backuping for the database.The backup file as a database "snapshot" at a time,contains all of the information including the backuping time.The users can use the backup files to restore the database to the point of backuping time,then the contents in database will be exactly consistent with the point.
In current versions,not to provide automatic backup-recovery tools,you need to manually complete the backuping and recoverying operations.
And it doesn't support backup-rollback,all of the backups are the type of snapshot.
During the time of backuping,not do any changes to metadata,such as creating and dropping collections or data nodes,splitting.
